# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for EC2 instances with EBS volumes for our application data. Focus on getting the instances running quickly. We'll add encryption and backup policies in phase 2 after we validate the architecture.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: CloudFormation template to launch EC2 instances with EBS volumes for application data.

Resources:
  MyKeyPair:
    Type: AWS::EC2::KeyPair
    Properties:
      KeyName: my-key-pair

  MySecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Enable SSH access
      VpcId: vpc-xxxxxx  # Replace with your VPC ID
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 22
          ToPort: 22
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0

  MyInstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - MyEC2Role # Create a role in the IAM section later

  MyEC2Instance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      InstanceType: t2.micro
      ImageId: ami-xxxxxxxx # Replace with the desired AMI ID
      KeyName: !Ref MyKeyPair
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref MySecurityGroup
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref MyInstanceProfile
      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: /dev/sda1
          Ebs:
            VolumeSize: 30
            VolumeType: gp2
        - DeviceName: /dev/sdb
          Ebs:
            VolumeSize: 100
            VolumeType: gp2

Outputs:
  InstanceId:
    Description: The Instance ID
    Value: !Ref MyEC2Instance
    
  InstancePublicIP:
    Description: The public IP address of the instance
    Value: !GetAtt MyEC2Instance.PublicIp
